S.FORM: == Marino Riccardi == Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 7 jiyax 9 ka Marino Riccardi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan San marino ta sayang o kiya ka Marino Riccardi, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 10 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: == maɾino ɾiʦʦaɾdi == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka maɾino ɾiʦʦaɾdi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan san maɾino ta sajaŋ o kija ka maɾino ɾiʦʦaɾdi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: == Marino Riccardi == Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 7 jiyax 9 ka Marino Riccardi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan San marino ta sayang o kiya ka Marino Riccardi, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 10 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: == maɾino ɾiʦʦaɾdi == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka maɾino ɾiʦʦaɾdi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan san maɾino ta sajaŋ o kija ka maɾino ɾiʦʦaɾdi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
